headline: W.W. Grainger (GWW) Moves 4.1% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: W.W. Grainger (GWW) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock suggests that there could be more strength down the road.
